label: equality
gloss: typed identity: eq(x, y) holds iff x and y are the same individual of their shared sort.
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: APPROXIMATE bridge: THE-SAME is a determiner prime (sameness of discourse reference); mathematical equality is a typed identity relation with substitutivity. The correspondence is real but not exact; recorded as approximate, not as an identification.
